languages.text: "Леди Кассия, мы обернем ваши знания против железных ксеносов".
"Lady Cassia, we will turn your knowledge against the iron xenos."
languages.original_text: "Леди Кассия, мы обернем ваши знания против железных ксеносов".

traits.locale_text: "Lady Cassia, we will turn your knowledge against the iron xenos."
"Lady Cassia, we will turn your knowledge against the iron xenos."
"Lady Cassia, we will turn your knowledge against the iron xenos."

languages.text: 「カシア様、あなたの知識を鉄の異種族に反撃に利用します」
languages.original_text: "Lady Cassia, we will turn your knowledge against the iron xenos."

traits.locale_text: 「カシア様、あなたの知識を鉄の異種族に反撃に利用します」

languages.text: «Lady Cassia, usaremos sus conocimientos contra los xenos metálicos».
languages.original_text: "Lady Cassia, we will turn your knowledge against the iron xenos."

traits.locale_text: «Lady Cassia, usaremos sus conocimientos contra los xenos metálicos».

languages.text: “卡西娅女士，你的知识将成为对抗这些铁骸异形的利器。”
languages.original_text: "Lady Cassia, we will turn your knowledge against the iron xenos."

traits.locale_text: “卡西娅女士，你的知识将成为对抗这些铁骸异形的利器。”

languages.text: "Lady Cassia, wir werden Euer Wissen gegen die Eisenxenos einsetzen."
languages.original_text: "Lady Cassia, we will turn your knowledge against the iron xenos."

traits.locale_text: "Lady Cassia, wir werden Euer Wissen gegen die Eisenxenos einsetzen."

languages.text: "Leydi Cassia, bilgeliğini demir zenolara karşı kullanacağız."
languages.original_text: "Lady Cassia, we will turn your knowledge against the iron xenos."

traits.locale_text: "Leydi Cassia, bilgeliğini demir zenolara karşı kullanacağız."

languages.text: « Dame Cassia, nous emploierons vos connaissances contre les xénos de fer. »
languages.original_text: "Lady Cassia, we will turn your knowledge against the iron xenos."

traits.locale_text: « Dame Cassia, nous emploierons vos connaissances contre les xénos de fer. »
